claim: Computer use agents require pixel-level visual understanding combined with action generation - Microsoft's approach uses vision models to understand UI elements before executing clicks.
actionable: When building computer-use agents, implement visual understanding pipelines that identify UI elements before action execution, not just coordinate clicking.
source_title: How Microsoft gets AI to Click the Right Buttons!

claim: Grounding vision models on actual UI screenshots improves action accuracy compared to pure coordinate prediction, as it allows models to understand context and element relationships.
actionable: Include visual context (screenshots) in your computer-use agent's decision loop, not just coordinate history, to reduce click misalignment.
source_title: How Microsoft gets AI to Click the Right Buttons!
